name: SOX Control Testing
description: Automated SOX (Sarbanes-Oxley) IT control testing workflow. Collects evidence for key IT general controls (ITGC) including access management, change management, and system operations. Riggs AI evaluates control effectiveness against SOX requirements, flags deficiencies, and routes results through management approval before documenting in the audit trail. Control failures trigger immediate remediation tickets.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Document control test results and create remediation tickets for deficiencies

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify IT audit team and management of control testing results

config.description: Triggers quarterly SOX IT general controls testing cycle

config.query: SELECT control_id, control_name, control_category, last_test_date, last_test_result, evidence_artifacts, owner FROM sox_controls WHERE active = true ORDER BY control_category, control_id
config.description: Gather current state of all active SOX IT general controls and their last test results

config.query: SELECT cl.change_id, cl.system, cl.change_type, cl.approval_status, cl.changed_by, cl.change_date, al.user_id, al.access_level, al.granted_date, al.last_review FROM change_log cl FULL OUTER JOIN access_log al ON cl.system = al.system WHERE cl.change_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' OR al.granted_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
config.description: Pull change management and access provisioning logs for the past quarter

config.additional_instructions: Evaluate IT general controls against SOX Section 404 requirements. Test access management controls, change management controls, and computer operations controls. Identify any control deficiencies, material weaknesses, or significant deficiencies. Document test procedures and results.
config.description: AI-powered assessment of SOX ITGC effectiveness and compliance
Routes based on whether SOX control deficiencies were identified
Create a remediation ticket for SOX control deficiencies

config.approval_message:
SOX quarterly control testing complete. Please review AI-generated assessment and confirm results for documentation.

{{analyze_1.summary}}
config.description: IT audit manager reviews and approves the SOX control testing results

parameters.note: SOX quarterly ITGC testing complete. All controls operating effectively. No deficiencies identified.

config.description: Document that all SOX controls passed testing for this quarter
Notify the audit team of completed SOX control testing results
SOX control testing complete -- results documented, approved, and communicated
